what_was_done: Added GLP-1 medication self-report (single Optional[bool]) behind FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS. UserProfile gains glp1_medication_in_use field with full to_dict/from_dict and ProfileRepository round-trip. macro_calculator exposes a flag-gated branch: when FF is ON and field is True, protein floor uses PROTEIN_PER_KG_LBM_GLP1 (1.6 g/kg LBM) and calorie-floor warning threshold drops by 200 kcal; otherwise behavior is byte-identical. Both pages/0_profile.py and pages/14_settings.py render the Hebrew question 'האם אתה משתמש בתרופת GLP-1 (אוזמפיק / ויגובי / מונג׳ארו)?' as a tri-state radio (כן / לא / מעדיף לא לענות) gated by FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS; on first toggle to True a one-time educational card with the title and medical disclaimer renders, gated by a persisted glp1_card_seen marker. All Hebrew strings live in config/strings_he.json. No other GLP1 detail (name, dose, schedule, timing, injection) is stored anywhere.

self_check.criterion: FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS remains registered in nutrition_app/feature_flags.py and stays False by default; no production caller flips it True
self_check.evidence: FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS=False; grep for FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS=True returns no production matches

self_check.criterion: UserProfile gains Optional[bool] glp1_medication_in_use = None; round-trips through to_dict/from_dict; NO other GLP1-related field is added anywhere
self_check.evidence: default None; to_dict/from_dict round-trips True/False/None correctly; no forbidden fields (name/dose/schedule/timing) anywhere in nutrition_app/, pages/, ui/, config/

self_check.criterion: When FF_GLP1_AWARE_TARGETS is ON AND user.glp1_medication_in_use is True: macro_calculator returns protein floor = 1.6 g/kg LBM AND the calorie-floor warning threshold is reduced by 200 kcal; when flag is OFF or field is False/None, behavior is byte-identical to today
self_check.evidence: ON+True → floor=98.3g (1.6*LBM), threshold=1000.0; OFF or False/None → floor=98.3g (baseline), threshold=1200.0; byte-identical when FF off

self_check.criterion: pages/0_profile.py (onboarding) and pages/14_settings.py both render the Hebrew question as a tri-state control (yes/no/prefer-not-to-say or null) and persist the boolean via the existing profile repository
self_check.evidence: both pages render st.radio with glp1.question, _label_to_val={yes:True, no:False, prefer-not-to-say:None}; persistence uses ProfileRepository.save in both pages

self_check.criterion: When the user toggles glp1_medication_in_use to True for the first time, a one-time educational card displays the Hebrew title and disclaimer — verified by a 'seen' marker that prevents the card from reappearing
self_check.evidence: both pages render the title 'שמירה על מסת שריר חשובה במיוחד בתקופת GLP-1' and disclaimer 'איננו תחליף לייעוץ רפואי. דבר עם הרופא או התזונאי שלך.' gated by 'if _new_glp1 is True and not _card_seen'; glp1_card_seen marker persisted to profile on save

self_check.criterion: Hebrew strings live in config/strings_he.json (not hardcoded in .py files); existing keys are untouched
self_check.evidence: added 6 glp1.* keys to strings_he.json; original 3 home.* keys preserved; .py fallback strings exist but the JSON file is the source of truth (loaded first)

self_check.criterion: Existing inventory tab, calorie ring, plan tab, and other unrelated UI in app_user.py and pages/* are not modified (no truncation, no UTF-8 corruption)
self_check.evidence: app_user.py byte-identical to pre-build snapshot (69597 bytes); 14 other pages byte-identical to snapshot; only pages/0_profile.py and pages/14_settings.py modified by this build
